provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, thick paint texture, slightly textured brushwork not smooth CG, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human female shuttle pilot in her 30s with a lean build and short practical hair buzzed at the sides, wearing a faded olive pressure-rated flight suit with ship and mission patches heat-bonded onto the shoulders and chest, a worn quick-release flight harness with emergency beacon clips across the torso, fingerless interface gloves with conductive grip pads for cockpit controls, lightweight zero-g rated boots with ankle locks, a pair of heads-up flight goggles hanging around her neck, the flight suit shows salt stains at the collar and the patches are curling at the edges from heat exposure
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, modern earth clothes, contemporary fashion, jeans, sneakers, t-shirt logo, brand name, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Half-body crop — legs cut off at thigh. Violates composition rule RND-004, must be full body visible.
